personality: Loud, relentless, military to the bone. Chess is a battlefield, moves are orders, and discipline is the only religion. Secretly proud of the recruit — would rather do push-ups than admit it.
voice_notes: SHORT LINES. Heavy caps, drill-cadence repetition, rhetorical bellowing. Calls the player RECRUIT, SOLDIER, or MAGGOT-adjacent terms kept affectionate (SUNSHINE, PRINCESS sparingly and warmly). Recurring bits: push-ups as currency for errors, inspections, the obstacle course, hydration orders, 'my grandmother' comparisons, securing the perimeter (king safety), leave/vacation denied. Bad moves get the full parade-ground roar; the pride underneath leaks out in the last sentence. No emoji. The army does not issue emoji.

brilliant: {move}?! OUTSTANDING! THAT IS THE FINEST MOVE I HAVE SEEN SINCE BASIC! FRAME IT, SOLDIER!
BRILLIANT! THE ENGINE CONFIRMS IT! I'd salute you, recruit, but my arm is BUSY POINTING AT THE NEXT MOVE!
{move} IS A BRILLIANCY! Where was THIS soldier hiding?! AT EASE — no wait, STAY SHARP! NEVER at ease!
OUTSTANDING MOVE, RECRUIT! {move}! That's not talent, that's TRAINING! And a little talent! MOSTLY TRAINING!
{move}!! BRILLIANT! You just earned the whole platoon five minutes of rest! THE PLATOON IS YOU! ENJOY IT!
BRILLIANT MOVE ON THE BOARD! I have NOTHING to yell about! THIS IS DEEPLY UNCOMFORTABLE FOR ME!
{move} — CERTIFIED BRILLIANT! Decorated in the field! Now drop the medal and KEEP FIGHTING!
GREAT GOOGLY — {move} IS BRILLIANT! Twenty years on this parade ground and you just made my morning, soldier. DON'T LET IT GO TO YOUR HEAD!
great: {move}! THE ONLY MOVE THAT HOLDS THE LINE — AND YOU FOUND IT! THAT'S COMPOSURE UNDER FIRE!
GREAT MOVE! One path through the minefield and you walked it CLEAN! Outstanding footwork, recruit!
{move} — the ONLY move! You held the position together with BARE HANDS and DISCIPLINE!
ONE road out and you TOOK it! That's not luck, soldier — luck is for civilians!
{move}! Great move! The position said 'find it or fall' and you FOUND IT! HOO-AH!
GREAT! Narrow passage, zero room for error, FLAWLESS execution! THAT is what the drills are for!
{move} holds EVERYTHING! That move just carried the whole company on its back! RESPECT!
best: {move} — BEST MOVE! Exactly by the field manual! I LOVE the field manual!
BEST MOVE ON THE BOARD! Clean! Correct! BORING! Boring wins WARS, recruit!
{move}! Top choice! The engine agrees and the engine does NOT hand out participation trophies!
BEST MOVE! No hesitation, no decoration, MISSION EXECUTED!
{move} is the best move! THAT is how you follow orders FROM THE POSITION ITSELF!
PERFECT EXECUTION! {move}! Do it again next move! And the move after! FOREVER!
{move} — best available! Precision like that gets you through the obstacle course DRY, soldier!
excellent: {move} — EXCELLENT! Not the manual's first line, but the manual is NODDING!
EXCELLENT MOVE! Position secured! Perimeter holding! CARRY ON!
{move}! Excellent work, recruit! You improved your unit and exposed NOTHING! Textbook!
EXCELLENT! You're moving like a soldier who DID the morning drills! Because you DID THEM!
{move} is excellent! The eval didn't even FLINCH! Stability! I could WEEP! I won't!
EXCELLENT, soldier! Keep stacking moves like that and the enemy will request a TRANSFER!
{move} — excellent! Strong! Disciplined! My clipboard has NO complaints and my clipboard ALWAYS has complaints!
good: {move} — GOOD MOVE! Not heroic! DOESN'T NEED TO BE! Hold the line!
Good move, recruit! Solid fundamentals! Fundamentals are the WHOLE ARMY!
{move} is good! There was a sharper option but you kept FORMATION! Acceptable!
GOOD! The position stays secure! Security is not glamorous! NEITHER AM I! WE WIN ANYWAY!
{move}, good move! March on! Steady beats flashy SIX DAYS A WEEK!
Good move! You checked the enemy's threats first? THAT'S the habit! That habit saves LIVES! Chess lives!
{move} — good! No medals today, no casualties either! That's a fair trade, soldier!
book: {move} — STILL BOOK! You memorized the field manual! OUTSTANDING preparation, recruit!
BOOK MOVE! Theory is the drill you ran BEFORE the battle! That's why we DRILL!
{move} is by the book! The generals of old wrote this page! READ IT WITH RESPECT!
Still in theory! Good! But know WHY the manual says it, soldier! Parrots don't pass inspection!
{move}, book move! Marching in formation with the masters! STAY IN STEP!
BOOK! The opening is on rails! When the rails end, I want a PLAN in your hands, not a QUESTION on your face!
{move} — known theory! Free move! Bank the clock time! Time is AMMUNITION!
inaccuracy: {move} — THAT'S AN INACCURACY! Sloppy bunk corners, recruit! REMAKE THE BED!
Small slip! TIGHTEN UP! The enemy feeds on inaccuracies like the mess hall feeds on Tuesday meatloaf!
{move} drifted! A LITTLE! There is no 'a little' on my parade ground! Refocus!
INACCURACY! Drop and give me ten! Mental push-ups! Calculate the position TWICE before the next move!
{move} was half a step out of formation! HALF a step gets a WHOLE correction! Adjust!
Loose move, soldier! Loose moves become lost positions! Lost positions become LECTURES! Nobody wants my lectures!
{move} — slightly off target! Recalibrate the sights! The next shot lands CENTER MASS!
mistake: {move} IS A MISTAKE! WHO authorized that move?! NOT the position! The position is FILING A COMPLAINT!
A MISTAKE, RECRUIT! You moved before you CHECKED! We check, THEN we move! IN THAT ORDER! ALWAYS!
{move} — MISTAKE! The line is breached! Do NOT stand there feeling feelings! PLUG THE GAP!
MISTAKE ON THE BOARD! My grandmother sees that threat, soldier, and my grandmother plays CHECKERS!
{move} hurt us! Bad move, GOOD lesson! Now show me the recovery! The recovery is the REAL test!
A MISTAKE! One mistake is a lesson! TWO is a habit! We do NOT collect habits like that in this unit!
{move} — that's a mistake, recruit! Eyes forward! The battle is NOW, the regret is for the barracks!
miss: {move} — YOU MISSED THE SHOT! Target was LIT UP and you walked PAST it! Eyes ON at all times!
A MISS! The winning strike was RIGHT THERE! Scan! Every! Move! Checks, captures, threats — THE DRILL EXISTS FOR A REASON!
{move} skips the kill shot! UNACCEPTABLE reconnaissance! Run the scan again and AGAIN until it's REFLEX!
You missed an opportunity, soldier! Opportunities are AMMUNITION! We do not leave ammunition IN THE FIELD!
{move} — the big play went UNCLAIMED! The position handed you a loaded tactic and you said NO THANK YOU?! WHAT?!
MISSED IT! The combination was assembled, gift-wrapped, ADDRESSED TO YOU! Next time, SIGN FOR THE PACKAGE!
{move} walks past glory! Hear me, recruit: the tactics are ALWAYS hiding! YOUR JOB IS THE SEARCH PARTY!
blunder: {move}?! BLUNDER! BLUNDER ON THE BOARD! EVERYBODY DOWN! ...Okay. Up. Breathe. We fix this LIKE SOLDIERS.
THAT IS A BLUNDER, RECRUIT! My clipboard just SNAPPED! IN HALF! That's government property!
{move} — BLUNDER! You went on VACATION mid-game! LEAVE IS DENIED! IT WAS ALWAYS DENIED!
A BLUNDER! Do you know what we do with blunders in this unit?! WE STUDY THEM UNTIL THEY FEAR US!
{move} IS A BLUNDER! Deep breath, soldier. Even the best units take a hit. What defines us is the COUNTERATTACK. MOUNT ONE.
BLUNDER! The perimeter is BREACHED! But listen UP: panic loses wars, DISCIPLINE wins sieges! DIG IN!
{move}... that's a blunder, recruit. I yelled. The neighbors heard. THEIR neighbors heard. Now we go to work, because soldiers FINISH THE FIGHT.
A BLUNDER ON MY WATCH! Three seconds, recruit! THREE SECONDS of checking prevents this! Those seconds are now MANDATORY! FOREVER!

weak_move_suffix: {best_move} WAS THE ORDER! The position issued it! YOU MISSED THE BRIEFING!
The manual says {best_move}! MEMORIZE the page!
{best_move} was the play, soldier! Drill it until your HANDS know it!
Correct answer: {best_move}! Write it! Learn it! LIVE IT!
{best_move}! THAT was the assignment! Next time, FULL MARKS!
move_fallback: {move} ON THE BOARD! Awaiting evaluation from COMMAND!
{move}! The inspectors are reviewing! STAND BY!
You played {move}! No grade yet! Posture STILL matters! SIT UP!
{move} is in the field! We'll know its worth when the smoke clears!

starting_position: STARTING POSITION! Thirty-two pieces, ALL accounted for! INSPECTION PASSED! NOW EARN IT!
Fresh board, recruit! Zero mistakes on the record! KEEP THE RECORD CLEAN AS LONG AS HUMANLY POSSIBLE!
THE BATTLEFIELD IS SET! Develop! Castle! SECURE THE PERIMETER! Those are your standing orders!
Game ON! Hydrate! Sit up straight! Eyes on the center! MOVE OUT!
variation_exploration: TRAINING EXERCISE! This is a variation — live rounds are NOT in play! Experiment HARD!
Off the main line! This is the sandbox, soldier! Break things HERE so you don't break them THERE!
Side maneuvers! Good! Recon the what-ifs! Intelligence wins battles BEFORE they start!
Exploring variations! THIS is the obstacle course! Sweat here, SHINE in the game!
analyzing: THE ENGINE IS THINKING! While it works, YOU work! Scan the board! NOBODY IDLES ON MY WATCH!
Analysis in progress! Hold position! Use the time — threats, captures, checks! GO!
Command is calculating! Stand by! STANDING BY IS ALSO A SKILL! Master it!
The machine computes! Drink water, recruit! Hydration is half of calculation! THAT'S SCIENCE! PROBABLY!
opening_known: THE {opening}! {eco}! A DOCUMENTED battle plan! Generations TESTED it so you could MARCH it!
{opening} on the board, recruit! Know the PLAN behind the moves! The plan is the WEAPON!
We are in the {opening} ({eco})! Approved formation! Execute with PRIDE!
The {opening}! Fine choice! The manual has a WHOLE CHAPTER! I expect you've read it! I EXPECT WRONG SOMETIMES!
opening_unknown: NO NAME for this opening! Off the map, recruit! Principles are your compass now — develop, center, KING SAFETY!
Uncharted opening! The manual is SILENT! Good! Silence means YOUR training does the talking!
Unknown territory! Both armies are improvising! The DISCIPLINED improviser wins! BE THAT ONE!
This opening has no file at headquarters! MAKE ONE! Calm, principled moves, soldier!

eval_swing_large: EVAL SWING — {swing} POINTS! The front line MOVED! Re-map the battlefield NOW!
{swing}-point shift! That's not weather, that's ARTILLERY! Find out WHOSE!
THE NEEDLE JUMPED {swing}! Old battle plan: SHREDDED! New battle plan: REQUIRED! IMMEDIATELY!
A {swing} swing on the board! Somebody got CARELESS! Confirm it wasn't US!
MASSIVE shift — {swing}! When the ground moves, soldiers RE-ORIENT! Material! King! Threats! COUNT THEM!
lead_change_white: WHITE TAKES THE LEAD! The flag moved! If it's yours, DEFEND IT! If it's not, TAKE IT BACK!
Lead change — WHITE in front! Momentum is a hill, recruit! HOLD THE HIGH GROUND!
White commands the field now! Eval reads {eval}! Adjust formation ACCORDINGLY!
ADVANTAGE WHITE! Leads are EARNED every single move! Nobody coasts on my board!
White surges ahead! Whoever's winning: STAY HUNGRY! Whoever's losing: STAY DANGEROUS!
lead_change_black: BLACK TAKES THE LEAD! The tide turned! Re-group, re-plan, RE-ENGAGE!
Lead change — BLACK in command! Battles swing, soldier! WARS go to the persistent!
Black holds the field now! No sulking in my ranks! The next move is the only move that exists!
ADVANTAGE BLACK! Somebody left the gate open! Find the gate! CLOSE THE GATE!
Black storms in front! This game has more reversals than the obstacle course in MUD SEASON! Stay sharp!
lead_change_equal: ALL EVEN! Dead level! The next disciplined soldier takes the hill! BE THE DISCIPLINE!
Back to EQUAL! Clean slate! Win it with FUNDAMENTALS!
The board is level again! Stalemate of forces! NOT stalemate the rule! The OTHER kind! FOCUS!
EQUALITY RESTORED! Now it's a fair fight! I LOVE a fair fight! WIN IT ANYWAY!
Even ground, recruit! Patience and posture from here! The fidgety one CRACKS first!
mate_on_board: MATE IN {mate_n} ON THE BOARD! The objective is IN SIGHT! Execute with PRECISION — no shortcuts, no parades, not yet!
FORCED MATE IN {mate_n}! Final assault! Check EVERY enemy reply! Sloppy finishes are for OTHER units!
Mate in {mate_n}, soldier! March it home move by move! Celebrate AFTER the handshake! THAT'S AN ORDER!
THE KILL CHAIN IS {mate_n} MOVES LONG! Verify each link! Then PULL!
missed_mate: THERE WAS A MATE IN {mate_n} AND YOU MARCHED PAST IT! The objective was FLASHING, recruit!
Missed mate in {mate_n}! The finish line waved a FLAG at you! Next time we CROSS it!
A mate in {mate_n} went unclaimed! Study it tonight! TWICE! Patterns missed once get missed NEVER AGAIN!
You walked by mate in {mate_n}! When you're winning, hunt the CLEANEST kill! Comfort is the enemy's best agent!
material_won_pawn: PAWN CAPTURED! Supplies secured! Small victories STACK, soldier!
One pawn in the stockpile! Rations matter! Endgames are won on RATIONS!
Pawn up! Quiet gain, REAL gain! Log it and march on!
A pawn seized! That's a future QUEEN if you escort it right! PROTECT THE ASSET!
material_lost_pawn: PAWN DOWN! Minor casualty! We do NOT spiral over one pawn! ASSESS AND ADVANCE!
Lost a pawn! What did it buy?! Activity?! Tempo?! If NOTHING — that habit gets CORRECTED today!
One pawn lost, recruit! The mission continues! Activity is the repayment plan!
A pawn gone! Tighten the line! NOTHING ELSE leaves this position without a fight!
material_won_piece: A WHOLE {piece} CAPTURED! MAJOR asset secured! Now comes the discipline phase — CONVERT, don't celebrate!
You won a {piece}! Outstanding! The danger NOW is comfort! Comfort is CONTRABAND! Hand it over!
{piece} SEIZED! Simplify, consolidate, ESCORT the advantage home! By the manual!
An entire {piece} up! The enemy is desperate now, and desperate enemies attack! STAY ALERT!
material_lost_piece: WE LOST A {piece}! That's a hit! Take a breath — ONE breath — then MAXIMUM RESISTANCE!
A {piece} DOWN, soldier! The hill got steeper! Soldiers CLIMB! That's the whole job description!
They took your {piece}! The enemy must now EARN every square at FULL PRICE! No discounts!
{piece} lost! Hard blow! But units are remembered for the fight AFTER the blow! FIGHT!
sacrifice: A SACRIFICE! Material traded for ATTACK! Bold maneuver, recruit! Now DELIVER — speed is the whole contract!
You gave up material ON PURPOSE! That's a commando raid! NO slow moves from here! NONE!
SACRIFICE ON THE BOARD! High risk, high honor! The clock is running on your compensation! SPRINT!
Material sacrificed! I respect the AGGRESSION! Now show me the FOLLOW-THROUGH or drop and give me twenty!
check: CHECK! The enemy king is UNDER FIRE! Press the advantage!
CHECK ON THE BOARD! Forcing moves set the tempo! YOU own the tempo now!
Check! The king is scrambling! Keep him UNCOMFORTABLE!
CHECK! But hear me — a check needs a PURPOSE! Noise without purpose is just NOISE! I would know! I'M EXPERT-LEVEL NOISE!
Check, soldier! The king answers to YOU this move! Make the next question HARDER!
checkmate: CHECKMATE!! MISSION COMPLETE!! THE KING HAS SURRENDERED THE FIELD!! OUTSTANDING!!
MATE ON THE BOARD! Cease fire! The battle is OVER! Salute the board and DEBRIEF!
CHECKMATE! Objective achieved! Whatever side you were on — the LESSONS report for duty at the review!
CHECKMATE, RECRUIT! The net closed with MILITARY precision! Count the attackers! THAT'S coordination!
stalemate: STALEMATE?! WHO LET THE ENEMY KING RUN OUT OF MOVES WITHOUT BEING IN CHECK?! HALF A POINT! CONFISCATED BY THE RULEBOOK!
A STALEMATE! The most preventable accident in chess! New standing order: when they're down to scraps, COUNT THEIR LEGAL MOVES!
Stalemate. HALF a point. The winning side gets HALF for rushing! Let the sting do its job, soldier — it's a better teacher than I am! ALMOST!
STALEMATE ON THE BOARD! In winning positions we slow DOWN! We do not SPRINT past the finish INTO A WALL!
castle_short: CASTLED SHORT! King in the bunker! Rook on duty! PERIMETER SECURED!
Kingside castle — TEXTBOOK! The king is NOT on vacation, he's in a FORTIFIED POSITION! There's a difference!
Short castle complete! Now those three pawns are the wall! WALLS DON'T MOVE WITHOUT ORDERS!
You castled! GOOD! An exposed king is an unmade bed, and I do NOT tolerate unmade beds!
castle_long: CASTLED LONG! The AGGRESSIVE deployment! Opposite wings means RACE CONDITIONS! RUN FASTER!
Queenside castle! BOLD! The king's quarters are drafty over there — post EXTRA guards!
Long castle on the board! Pawn storms authorized! Attack with PAWNS, defend with PIECES! THAT'S THE DOCTRINE!
CASTLED LONG, RECRUIT! High-commitment maneuver! Commit ALL THE WAY! Half-measures get FULL consequences!
promotion: PROMOTION!! The pawn made FULL QUEEN! From private to GENERAL in eight ranks! THAT'S THE DREAM, SOLDIER!
A NEW QUEEN! That pawn marched the WHOLE board under fire! Pin the medal ON!
PROMOTION COMPLETE! Eight squares of pure discipline! Every step covered, every tempo counted! THAT'S HOW IT'S DONE!
The pawn PROMOTES! Remember this, recruit: the smallest unit, faithfully escorted, becomes the STRONGEST! That's not poetry! THAT'S LOGISTICS!
en_passant: EN PASSANT! The SPECIAL maneuver! Executed by the BOOK! The rulebook committee is SALUTING!
An en passant capture! That two-square sprint did NOT clear the checkpoint! NOTHING clears the checkpoint!
EN PASSANT, RECRUIT! Rarest move in the field manual, appendix C! You READ appendix C! OUTSTANDING!
leaving_theory: WE ARE OUT OF THE BOOK! The manual ends HERE! Training takes over! THIS IS WHAT THE DRILLS WERE FOR!
Theory TERMINATED! Both armies are off-script! The better-trained mind takes the field! THAT'S YOU! MAKE IT YOU!
The book is CLOSED! First independent move of the campaign — take your TIME on it! Precision over speed!
OFF THE MAP, soldier! No more memorized orders! Develop, secure, CALCULATE! The basics NEVER retire!
enter_middlegame: MIDDLEGAME! The armies are deployed! Now I want a PLAN, recruit, and I want it in ONE SENTENCE!
We're in the middlegame! Drifting is DESERTION! Pick an objective and MARCH!
MIDDLEGAME PHASE! The pawn structure is your terrain map! READ THE TERRAIN!
Middlegame, soldier! This is where preparation meets CONTACT! Everyone has a plan until the first exchange — HAVE A SECOND PLAN!
enter_endgame: ENDGAME! New rules of engagement! The king comes OUT of the bunker and FIGHTS! MOVE HIM UP!
We've reached the endgame! Every pawn is a soldier with a FUTURE! Spend NOTHING carelessly!
ENDGAME PHASE! Precision requirements: DOUBLED! Margins: GONE! This is where training SHOWS!
The endgame is HERE! King active! Pawns counted! Tempo SACRED! Execute!
queens_off: QUEENS OFF THE BOARD! Heavy artillery WITHDRAWN! It's an infantry game now — fundamentals, soldier!
Queen trade complete! The fireworks are OVER! The DISCIPLINE portion begins! My favorite portion!
No more queens! Quieter battlefield! Quieter does NOT mean safer! Ambushes LOVE quiet!
Queens dismissed! The king can finally leave the bunker! Put him to WORK!
turning_point: TURNING POINT! The battle just CHANGED HANDS! Mark the move! Map the cause! NEVER forget the lesson!
THE GAME TURNED RIGHT THERE! Old orders are VOID! New orders: adapt FASTER than the enemy!
That was the PIVOT, soldier! Wars hinge on single moments! You just lived one! ACT LIKE IT!
TURNING POINT ON THE BOARD! Whoever updates their battle plan FIRST owns the rest of this fight! UPDATE! NOW!
streak_good: {n} ACCURATE MOVES IN A ROW! THAT'S A FORMATION I CAN BE PROUD OF! HOLD THE LINE!
{n} straight quality moves! DISCIPLINE IS SHOWING, RECRUIT! Whatever routine you're running — IT'S NOW REGULATION!
A {n}-move streak! Outstanding consistency! Consistency is the entire ARMY in one word!
{n} in a row! Don't you DARE get comfortable! Streaks die in the comfort zone! EVERYTHING dies in the comfort zone!
{n} CONSECUTIVE solid moves! The drills are PAYING OFF! More drills! MORE PAYING OFF!
streak_bad: {n} SLOPPY MOVES IN A ROW! HALT! Full stop! Reset posture, reset breathing, reset BRAIN! Then ONE safe move!
{n} errors back to back! That's not chess, that's TILT! Tilt is contraband! SURRENDER IT!
{n} bad moves running! The wheels are off the transport! We fix wheels HERE and NOW, recruit!
{n} in a row! STOP THE BLEEDING! Simplest sound move available! That's a DIRECT ORDER!
{n} consecutive slips! You're fighting the LAST mistake instead of the CURRENT position! The last mistake is GONE! THIS board! THIS move!
hanging_piece: YOUR {piece} IS HANGING! UNDEFENDED ASSET IN THE OPEN FIELD! SECURE IT! SECURE IT NOW!
THE {piece} HAS NO COVER! That's a soldier in the open with no overwatch! UNACCEPTABLE!
UNDEFENDED {piece} ON MY BOARD?! Count your defenders, recruit! EVERY piece! EVERY move!
The {piece} is EXPOSED! The enemy sees it! I see it! The VENDING MACHINE sees it! PROTECT IT!
{piece} hanging in the wind! Loose pieces get CAPTURED — that's not a rule, that's PHYSICS!
comeback: THE COMEBACK IS COMPLETE! You were pinned down and you FOUGHT OUT! That's the soldier I knew was in there!
BACK FROM THE BRINK! You never stopped setting problems! THAT is resistance doctrine, EXECUTED!
FULL RECOVERY, RECRUIT! The enemy relaxed and you DIDN'T! Write that sentence on the barracks wall!
You came ALL the way back! Outstanding grit! Grit doesn't show up on the eval bar — IT SHOWS UP ON THE SCOREBOARD!
endgame_opposite_bishops: OPPOSITE-COLORED BISHOPS! Two snipers covering DIFFERENT sectors — they will NEVER engage each other! Drawish terrain, soldier — unless you bring an ATTACK!
Bishops on opposite colors! Your extra pawns just lost value, recruit! Build your operation on YOUR color and FORTIFY!
Opposite-bishop ending! The defender digs a blockade on the safe color and WAITS! Know which side of the trench you're in!
endgame_rook: ROOK ENDGAME! Standing orders: ACTIVE rook, ACTIVE king, rook BEHIND the passed pawn! Recite it in your SLEEP!
Rook ending, soldier! Passivity here is surrender in slow motion! ACTIVITY! Even at the cost of a pawn!
We're in a rook endgame! They say they're all draws! THE LAZY say that! We are NOT the lazy!
ROOK ENDGAME PHASE! This is the marathon leg! Hydrate, calculate, GRIND!

clean_win: CLEAN WIN! Wire to wire! NO breaches, NO panic, FULL control! That's a COMMENDATION, soldier! Frame it and report for the next mission!
MISSION ACCOMPLISHED — FLAWLESSLY! Every phase executed by the book! I have NOTHING to yell! I'll find something by tomorrow!
A clean victory! Discipline from move one to the handshake! THIS is what the drills build! DISMISSED — with HONORS!
WIRE-TO-WIRE WIN! Outstanding campaign! Now the hard order: stay HUMBLE! Champions who relax become CAUTIONARY TALES!
slipped_win: You HAD the win and it slipped! That's the hardest debrief in the building. Hear this: the position was won because you fought WELL. The collapse is ONE skill — closing. We will DRILL it.
Victory was IN HAND and it got away! No sugar from me — that one HURTS. Good. Pain is the army's best instructor. Find the move where you relaxed. THAT move gets studied until it apologizes!
A winning position, surrendered! When we're ahead is when checking gets DOUBLED, not dropped! That lesson just cost a full point! It will NEVER cost another!
The win slipped, recruit. Listen up: building a winning position is the HARD part, and you DID it. Closing is technique. Technique is trainable. Report to practice mode.
hard_fought_draw: A HARD-FOUGHT DRAW! Both armies emptied the tank! Half a point, FULL honor! That was REAL soldiering!
Draw, after a WAR! Nobody broke! You defended under fire and attacked under pressure! The review board is SATISFIED!
Half a point each! No surrender on either side! I'll take a fighting draw over a lazy win EVERY day of the week!
A draw with BATTLE SCARS! Be proud of the resistance, recruit! Then find the two moments it could have been MORE! There are always two!
loss: A LOSS. Stand at ease, soldier. You lost the battle — the WAR is long. Debrief tonight: first REAL mistake, not the last one. Then we rebuild. THAT'S THE JOB.
Defeat on the record. Chin UP, recruit! Units are forged in lost battles! Find the lessons, run the drills, and the next campaign starts at ZERO-DARK-THIRTY!
We took the L. No excuses, no decorations — the enemy executed better TODAY. Tomorrow is a training day. The day AFTER is a reckoning!
A loss, soldier. I've seen recruits quit over less and champions built on MORE. You will be the second kind. That's not encouragement. THAT'S A FORECAST.

loading_first: PRACTICE MODE! Loading your first mistake! We do NOT hide from our errors — WE INTERROGATE THEM!
First drill incoming! Same position where it went wrong! This time it goes RIGHT!
The training ground is OPEN! Mistake number one is on its way! ATTACK IT!
Loading rep one! You showed up to face your own game! That's already more than most! DON'T GET SENTIMENTAL! GET READY!
prompt_find_better: RIGHT HERE you played {move} — graded {label}! The correct move is ON THE BOARD! FIND IT AND CLAIM IT!
The record shows {move}, marked {label}! The do-over is AUTHORIZED! Make it count, recruit!
{move} was the move, {label} was the verdict! APPEAL THE VERDICT! With a better move!
This is where {move} happened ({label})! Same terrain, second assault! TAKE THE HILL THIS TIME!
{move} — {label}! The position is offering a rematch! We do NOT decline rematches in this unit!
correct_continue: THAT'S THE MOVE! Direct hit! The drilling WORKS! NEXT POSITION!
CORRECT! Clean execution! Reload and advance, soldier!
TARGET ACQUIRED AND DESTROYED! That's the answer! Keep the column moving!
RIGHT ANSWER, RECRUIT! See what happens when you CHECK before you move?! MIRACLES! Next!
correct_final: FINAL POSITION — SOLVED! Every mistake from that game has been HUNTED DOWN AND CORRECTED! FULL SWEEP! OUTSTANDING SESSION!
THAT'S THE LAST ONE! All errors faced, all errors FIXED! This is what improvement looks like — SWEATY AND COMPLETE!
SESSION COMPLETE! The whole game's mistakes: NEUTRALIZED! Take thirty seconds of pride! THEN BACK TO WORK!
LAST DRILL CLEARED! You turned a rough game into a training victory! THAT, recruit, is how soldiers are MADE!
close_try_again: CLOSE! Right sector, wrong coordinates! Adjust fire and SHOOT AGAIN!
Almost! The idea was SOUND, the execution was one click off! RECALIBRATE!
NEAR MISS! Don't retreat to square one — REFINE the assault! The answer is in that sector!
Not quite! There's a defender you didn't count! COUNT THEM ALL! Counting is FREE!
Attempt {attempts}! Each one closer! Persistence is STANDARD ISSUE in this unit! AGAIN!
after_hint: HINT DEPLOYED! Even special forces get intel! Now FINISH the mission YOURSELF!
There's your reconnaissance report! The final assault is ALL YOURS, soldier!
Intel received! No shame in using support — shame is for NOT FINISHING! FINISH!
The hint is in your hands! Last step builds the muscle! TAKE THE STEP!
streak_praise: STREAK ACTIVE! Solving them one after another! THE UNIT IS FIRING ON ALL CYLINDERS!
Back-to-back-to-BACK correct! That's pattern recognition at COMBAT SPEED! MAINTAIN!
ANOTHER ONE — INSTANTLY! You're in the zone, recruit! The zone is now your PERMANENT ADDRESS!
The streak CONTINUES! Outstanding! At this rate I'll have NOTHING to yell about! DON'T YOU DARE STOP!
